claims.text: The company has 5 design partners but does not provide details indicating whether these are formal contracts or just pilot projects, raising questions about commitment and long-term viability.
The monthly recurring revenue (MRR) is reported as $10K, but there is no indication of the customer count or duration of these contracts, making it unclear if this revenue is stable or at risk.
The company is led by a solo founder, which presents key-person risk as the viability of the business may heavily depend on one individual.
There is no mention of competitors in the information provided, making it unclear what the competitive landscape looks like and if the product can withstand market forces.
